subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Mazindaran
subcodes.first_line: O My Name! O thou who gazest upon the Sun of My Manifestation! Make mention in the Tablet of the people of M and A [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی یا ایها الناظر الى شمس ظهورى اهل میم و الف را در لوح ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
